section.heading: Secretary of the Interior; authority to transfer lamprey control projects and act on behalf of United States Section
section.chapeau: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized, upon the request of the United States Section—

subsection.content: to transfer to the United States Section any lamprey control project or works under his jurisdiction now existing or now under construction; and
to act for or on behalf of the United States Section in the exercise of the powers granted by this chapter.
